title: A priceless ancient golden helmet stolen from a Dutch museum is recovered
description: Dutch authorities have recovered a priceless ancient golden helmet from Romania stolen last year from a museum in the Netherlands. Under police guard, prosecutors unveiled the 2,500-year-old Cotofenesti helmet during a press conference in the eastern Dutch city of Assen...

title: Good Friday marked by ancient prayers, solemn processions
description: Good Friday is marked by ancient prayers, quiet reflection and solemn processions as Christians commemorate the crucifixion of Jesus Christ, a tradition rooted in centuries of faith and ritual.

title: Contractor that cut back ancient oak in London park identified
description: Document shows partial felling last year, which led to legal action against Toby Carvery, was done by Ground Control

title: Ancient Romanian artifact recovered after brazen theft from Dutch museum
description: That stolen ancient helmet finally resurfaced after it was brazenly stolen from a museum

title: New Sea Monster Species Identified From 70-Million-Year-Old Skull Fossil in Mexico
description: The Gulf of Mexico branded as Gulf of America is pictured through a magnifying glass on the Google Maps app on a computer in Bogota on February 11, 2025.
